name: New signup lands on the onboarding wizard
description: A new user creates an account with a unique email and password and is taken to the academic onboarding wizard, which begins with selecting their university/institution.

planSteps.description: Type a unique, randomized email address into the email field
Type a password of at least 8 characters into the password field

Verify the user arrives on the onboarding/setup screen (URL path under onboarding) showing a university or institution search/autocomplete field and a step progression indicator for the academic setup — not the marketing landing page and not a blank screen
